seoTitle: Mount Mackay vs Mount Maria — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Mackay and Mount Maria. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Mackay vs Mount Maria: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Mackay and Mount Maria.
heading: Mount Mackay vs Mount Maria — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Mackay, Queensland and Mount Maria, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Mackay has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Mount Maria (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Mackay or Mount Maria safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Mackay has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Mount Maria scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Mackay scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Maria scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Mackay or Mount Maria?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Mackay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
